basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre (TMC) Housekeeping Supervisor Notification 2026 has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the TMC Housekeeping Supervisor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: Deserving and bright candidates may be given age relaxation.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc./Bachelor in (Hotel Management) and any other equivalent course from a recognized university with minimum 50% marks. Desirable: Minimum 01 year experience in relevant field.
qualification.details: Housekeeping Supervisor: B.Sc./Bachelor in (Hotel Management) and any other equivalent course from a recognized university with minimum 50% marks. Desirable: Minimum 01 year experience in relevant field.

all_official_links.label: Download TMC Housekeeping Supervisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TMC Housekeeping Supervisor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for email application for the online interview is 17th June 2026. However, the walk-in interview is scheduled for 19th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Housekeeping Supervisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. or Bachelor's degree in Hotel Management or an equivalent course from a recognized university with at least 50% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: While not mandatory, having a minimum of 01 year of experience in a relevant field is considered desirable for the Housekeeping Supervisor position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Housekeeping Supervisor role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 30 years. Age relaxation may be provided to deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Housekeeping Supervisor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,506 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Housekeeping Supervisor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Housekeeping Supervisor position at Tata Memorial Centre.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. No prior online application is required.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Muzaffarpur, Bihar, with the pincode 842004. The exact venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.
